sn51.17:1.1: "Bhikkhus, whatever ascetics or brahmins in the past wielded the various kinds of spiritual power, such that: having been one, they became many … they exercised mastery with the body as far as the brahma world—all did so because they had developed and cultivated the four bases for spiritual power.
sn51.17:2.1: "Whatever ascetics or brahmins in the future will wield the various kinds of spiritual power, such that: having been one, they will become many … sn.v.275 … they will exercise mastery with the body as far as the brahma world—all will do so because they will have developed and cultivated the four bases for spiritual power.
sn51.17:3.1: "Whatever ascetics or brahmins at present wield the various kinds of spiritual power, such that: having been one, they become many … they exercise mastery with the body as far as the brahma world—all do so because they have developed and cultivated the four bases for spiritual power.
sn51.17:6.1: "Bhikkhus, whatever ascetics or brahmins in the past … in the future … at present wield the various kinds of spiritual power … all do so because they have developed and cultivated these four bases for spiritual power."
